sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92400" key="r(igoma/xhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥῑγο-μάχης</orth>, or <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥῑ´γο-χος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n92400.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fighting with cold,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.155</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Lucill.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
